name: Lemon Mousse Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mousse: In a large shallow bowl, mix yolks with sugar, water, salt, and gelatin. Whip constantly over boiling water until thick and lemon-colored. Remove from heat. Add strained lemon juice and zest. Cool to room temperature; reserve.
2. Whip egg whites with 1/4 cup sugar to soft peaks. Temper the yolk-lemon mixture with a large spoonful of egg whites. Fold in the remainder; reserve.
3. Whip cream with 1/3 cup sugar. Fold into the reserved lemon mixture. Pour into a 10-inch springform pan lined with shortbread crust. Chill for 2-3 hours. Remove from the pan. Garnish with lemon twists. Cut into 8 slices. Serve with caramel sauce, if desired.
4. Shortbread Crust: Whip butter with sugar and salt until light and smooth. Add egg, then flour. Whip until fluffy. Spread evenly into a 10-inch springform pan. Bake at 300°F for 10 minutes. Cool.
